# From Academia to Industry

> A Quarto RevealJS presentation by Indrajeet Patil.

A comprehensive guide for transitioning from academic career to industry

- [Slides](https://www.indrapatil.com/academia-to-industry/)

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/academia-to-industry/)

- industry
- career transition
